---
title: "About Me"
---

## Egor Lvov

I'm a student exploring data science, machine learning, and software development.

**Skills:** Python · Data Analysis · OOP · Machine Learning  
**GitHub:** [github.com/GreenCurve](https://github.com/GreenCurve)

## Education

- Currently studying Data Science / Computer Science

## Interests

- Building tools that automate tedious things
- Data visualization
- Open source projects
